# bupd.xyz

Personal site and blog for Prasanth Baskar, also known as bupd.

Primary topics:

- Platform engineering
- Kubernetes
- Harbor and OCI registries
- Software supply chains
- GitOps
- AI agents as software manufacturers
- Arch Linux, Neovim, tmux, and developer workflows

Important pages:

- Home: https://bupd.xyz/
- Blogs: https://bupd.xyz/blogs/
- RSS: https://bupd.xyz/blogs/index.xml
- Search index: https://bupd.xyz/index.json
- Required article: https://bupd.xyz/blogs/manufacutring-software-like-chips/
- Projects: https://bupd.xyz/projects/
- Talks: https://bupd.xyz/talks/
- YouTube talks playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLjf5MAZubBLsnQi7dTKlL0Hi6HFzMYo6O
- About: https://bupd.xyz/about/

The site is static, generated by Hugo, and written as Markdown files in the repository.
